title: albizia dolichadena
intro: Albizia dolichadena is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae, native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Albizia dolichadena include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a decoction or infusion, where the leaves and stems are steeped in hot water to create a medicinal tea.
